nasb.text: Now when they fall they will be granted a little help, and many will join with them in hypocrisy.

esv.text: When they stumble, they shall receive a little help. And many shall join themselves to them with flattery,

cnv.text: 他們仆倒的時候，必得到一些援助，必有許多人用奉承的話要和他們聯盟。

ccb.text: 他们败亡时必得不到多少援助，许多人并非真心实意地加入他们的行列。
